welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 4 Free Night Awards (35k pts each): 3 after $3,000 spend in 3 months, plus 1 after total $4,000 spend in 4 months. Plus $100 airline credit.

earning_rates.notes: At hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy.
On first $6,000 spent combined annually on grocery stores, gas stations, and dining.

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
annual_credits.description: Free Night Award (up to 35,000 points) each account anniversary year.

annual_credits.name: Airline Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 in statement credits ($50 every 6 months) for airline purchases through 12/31/2026.

other_benefits.name: 15 Elite Night Credits
other_benefits.description: Jump-start to next status level every calendar year.

other_benefits.name: Pathway to Gold
other_benefits.description: Earn Gold Elite status by spending $35,000 on purchases each calendar year.
